import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    used = list.push(used, 0)
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      match used.get(j)
      when Some(uu)
        match xs.get(j)
        when Some(vv)
          if uu == 0
            if best_idx == -1 or vv > best_val
              best_idx = j
              best_val = vv
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if best_idx >= 0
      result = list.push(result, best_val)
      mut new_used: List<Int> = []
      mut m = 0
      while m < n
        match used.get(m)
        when Some(uu)
          if m == best_idx
            new_used = list.push(new_used, 1)
          else
            new_used = list.push(new_used, uu)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        m = m + 1
      end
      used = new_used
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  result
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(l1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(l2)
    let nums = parse_ints(l1)
    let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(l2))
    when Some(k)
      let total = sorted.len()
      let take = if k > total
        total
      else
        k
      end
      mut out = ""
      mut i = 0
      while i < take
        match sorted.get(i)
        when Some(v)
          if i == 0
            out = "#{v}"
          else
            out = "#{out} #{v}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      println(out)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
